evidences.content: 最后再说一遍，静态灯只是用来烘烤的。 To run through it one last time, static lights are used just for light baking. 游戏开始后，灯光不能移动、 The lights cannot be moved once we have started playing our game, 和静态灯光的渲染速度是最快的，因为我们禁用了很多功能，以 and static lights are the fastest to render because we're disabling a lot of features to 使其静止。静止的灯光部分是烘烤的，部分是活动的。 make them static. Stationary lights are partially baked and partially movable. 这些灯光在游戏中无法移动。它们将为我们的灯光烘焙做出贡献、 These lights cannot be moved while in-game. They will contribute to our light bake, 并将光照烘焙到静态网格上，但这样会继续投射 and it will bake the lighting onto static meshes, but this will continue to cast 场景中任何可移动物体（最常见的是人物）产生的光影。 light and shadows from any movable objects in our scene, the most common one being characters. 因此，在视频游戏中，他们会在角色行走的区域使用大量固定的灯光。 So in video games, they'll use a lot of stationary lights in areas where characters are going to walk 这样，人物就会投射出阴影，但实际投射到环境中的光线 through so that the characters cast shadows, but the actual lighting cast onto the environment 已经被预先计算并烘焙成轻质纹理。 has already been pre-computed and baked down into those light mass textures. 最后，我们将使用最多的是用于动态照明的活动灯。 And lastly, movable lights, which we will be using most of all, are for dynamic lighting. 如果烘焙灯光，这些灯光将不会被烘焙，而且这些灯光的渲染速度最慢 These lights will not be baked if you bake out your lighting, and these are the slowest to render 因为它们的阴影。现在，虚幻中特有的一个功能就是衰减半径设置。 because of their shadows. Now one thing specific to Unreal is this attenuation radius setting. 无论光线强度如何，它都会限制光线的投射距离。 This will limit how far a light is cast regardless of its intensity, and this feature is for the 因为它可以将我们的灯光限制在以下范围内，从而缩短渲染时间。 video game aspect of Unreal because it's going to reduce the render time by limiting our lights to 特定区域，这样我们就不会无谓地计算那些实际上并不 a specific area, so we're never needlessly calculating lights that aren't actually 为某个区域做出贡献。如果你的房间里有非常明亮的灯光，这可能会有点恼人。 contributing to an area. Now this can be a little bit annoying if you have really bright lights in 在场景中，您必须继续增大衰减半径。 your scene, you'll have to continue increasing this attenuation radius, and the same is true 用于反射。因此，如果您想让一个物体在场景中反射，您只能看到 for reflections. So if you want an object to reflect in your scene, you'll only see the 任何光线在衰减半径内的反射。这就是流明。 reflection inside of the attenuation radius for any light. Now this brings us to Lumen. 现在，Lumen 是虚幻 5 中获得动态全局照明或反弹照明的解决方案。 Now Lumen is the solution in Unreal 5 to get dynamic global illumination or bounce lighting 和动态反射。现在，Lumen 正在接管这两个系统。这就是 and dynamic reflections. So now Lumen is taking over both of these systems. This is the way that 虚幻 5 能够模拟路径追踪并为我们提供真正高质量的结果，而且大部分的 Unreal 5 is able to mimic path tracing and give us really high quality results, and most of the Lumen 的设置位于后期处理卷内。因此，如果您想更改 settings for Lumen are located inside of your post-process volume. So if you want to change the 质量设置，这就是你要在后期处理卷中进行调整的地方。现在流明 quality settings, that's where you'll be tweaking it is inside your post-process volume. Now Lumen 支持发射材料，所以你只需在一个材料上添加一个发射通道即可、 supports emissive materials, so you can just have materials that have an emissive channel over one, 就会开始为场景提供全局光照。但这有 and that will start contributing global illumination into your scene. But this has 就像我们之前在暗夜环境中看到的那样。它将收集光样本 limitations as we saw earlier in our dark night environment. It's going to collect light samples 随着时间的推移，我们需要给它时间来提高照明质量，这就是为什么你会看到 over time, so we need to give it time to build up the lighting quality, and that's why you'll see 我们的角色身后会出现重影。而流明是基于屏幕空间的、 that ghosting happening behind our character there. And Lumen is based on screen space, 所以它只能看到摄像机看到的东西。这并不完全正确，它正在做几件事 so it's only going to see what the camera sees. This isn't entirely true, it's doing a couple 因此，它不仅基于屏幕空间，而且流明也会在屏幕周围开始变化。 things at once, so it's not only based on screen space, but Lumen will start to change around the 根据您在场景中的视角来确定画面的边缘。现在，Lumen 与以下设备配合使用效果最佳 edges of your frame based on where you're looking inside your scene. Now Lumen works best with 当我说防水几何体时，我指的是 intersecting watertight geometry, and when I say watertight geometry, I mean the difference between 一个平面和一个立方体。立方体我认为是不透水的几何体，在这种情况下，物体会变成 a plane and a cube. A cube I would consider watertight geometry, where that object becomes 双面。我们有一个正面和一个背面，而平面是单面几何体、 two-sided. We have a front face and a back face, whereas planes are one-sided geometry, 而单面几何图形在游戏引擎中的效果并不理想。你会明白为什么 and one-sided geometry just doesn't work quite as well inside of a game engine. And you'll see why 当我在场景中添加一个平面时。当我观察底面时，我可以完全看透它、 when I add a plane into the scene. But in the project settings, we'll set our shadows to virtual shadow maps for now. 正如我所说，阴影是根据光线决定的，因此我们可以在下列情况下禁用投射阴影 And like I said, shadows are determined per light, so we can disable our cast shadows if 我们不需要阴影，或者阴影在我们的场景中并没有太大的作用。 we don't need the shadows or they're just not really making a big difference in our scene. 如果我们想节省性能，我们可以在下拉菜单中启用光线追踪阴影。 If we want to save on performance and we can enable those ray traced shadows in this drop 就在这里。我想说的最后一个照明功能是 IES 灯。所以我们 down right here. And the last lighting feature that I want to talk about are IES lights. So we 可以看到这些灯光投射出不同的投影，这是因为我们有不同的 can see that these lights are casting different projections and that's because we have different IES 配置文件。因此，如果我选中这盏灯，然后向下滚动，就能在其下方看到灯光功能、 IES profiles.
